name: Rhubarb Crumb Tart
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. For crust, mix flour, baking powder, and confectioners' sugar in a medium bowl. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add egg and milk; stir until a ball forms. Pat into a greased 11-inch x 7-inch x 2-inch baking pan. Place rhubarb in crust. Sprinkle gelatin over rhubarb. In a small bowl, mix topping ingredients together until crumbly. Sprinkle over rhubarb mixture. Bake at 350 degrees for 45-50 minutes. Allow to cool until firm. Yield: 12-15 servings.
NOTE: For variety, raspberry gelatin can be used, then add fresh or frozen raspberries with the rhubarb.
